description: Area grid overlay on a sheet shape. Defines a rectangular region using horizontal and vertical ranges (normalized 0-1), with a grid size for counting.
utility: Overlay area grid on a sheet for region visualization

examples.scenario: Four area regions on a sheet with different colors
examples.expression:
s = sheetrect(at(2,2), view(10,10), 5, 5, fc(lightyellow), fo(0.2))
ag1 = area(s, range(0, 0.6), range(0, 0.6), size(3,3), fc(red), fo(0.15))
ag2 = area(s, range(0.6, 1), range(0, 0.6), size(2,3), fc(green), fo(0.15))
ag3 = area(s, range(0, 0.6), range(0.6, 1), size(3,2), fc(green), fo(0.15))
ag4 = area(s, range(0.6, 1), range(0.6, 1), size(2,2), fc(blue), fo(0.15))

examples.scenario: Simple area grid on a sheet
examples.expression:
sheet = sheetrect(at(4,4), view(14,14), 6, 4, c(navy), fc(lightyellow), fo(0.5))
area_1 = area(sheet, range(0, 1), range(0, 1), size(6, 4))
